turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
ATS key skill for below job profiles. 1. Procure-to-Pay process (P2P)
2. Order-to-Cash process (O2C)
3. Record-to-Report process (R2R)
4. Budgeting and Forecasting process
5. Financial Reporting process
6. Accounts Payable process
7. Accounts Receivable process
8. Cash Management process
9. Bank Reconciliation process
10. Fixed Assets Management process
11. Accounting process
12. Management process.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Procure-to-Pay process (P2P):
- Purchase order (PO) processing
- Vendor management
- Invoice processing 
- Payment processing 
- Inventory management
- Process improvement 
- SAP or other ERP systems
- Data analysis 
- Strong communication skills 

2. Order-to-Cash process (O2C):
- Order processing 
- Sales support 
- Customer service 
- Billing and collection 
- Payment follow-up 
- Credit management 
- Cash application 
- Process improvement 
- Salesforce or other CRM systems 
- Excel or other spreadsheet software 

3. Record-to-Report process (R2R):
- General ledger accounting 
- Journal entry posting 
- Account reconciliation 
- Fixed assets accounting 
- Financial statement preparation 
- Process improvement 
- SAP or other ERP systems 
- Attention to detail 
- Analytical skills 

4. Budgeting and Forecasting process:
- Budget preparation 
- Forecasting 
- Variance analysis 
- Financial modeling 
- Excel or other spreadsheet software 
- SAP or other ERP systems 
- Attention to detail 
- Excellent analytical skills 

5. Financial Reporting process:
- Financial statement preparation 
- Compliance with accounting standards 
- Regulatory reporting 
- Data analysis 
- SAP or other ERP systems 
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills 

6. Accounts Payable process:
- Invoice processing 
- Payment processing 
- Vendor management 
- Budget management 
- Attention to detail 
- SAP or other ERP systems 
- Time management skills 

7. Accounts Receivable process:
- Invoice processing 
- Payment processing 
- Customer service 
- Billing and collection 
- Payment follow-up 
- Credit management 
- Salesforce or other CRM systems 
- Attention to detail 

8. Cash Management process:
- Cash forecasting 
- Cash budgeting 
- Banking relationships management 
- Treasury operations 
- Attention to detail 
- SAP or other ERP systems 
- Analytical skills 

9. Bank Reconciliation process:
- Bank statement reconciliation 
- Cash management 
- Attention to detail 
- SAP or other ERP systems 
- Analytical skills 

 10. Fixed Assets Management process:
- Asset accounting 
- Asset tracking 
- Depreciation management 
- Inventory management 
- Attention to detail 
- SAP or other ERP systems 
- Analytical skills 

11. Accounting process:
- General ledger accounting 
- Journal entry posting 
- Account reconciliation 
- Compliance with accounting standards 
- Attention to detail 
- SAP or other ERP systems 
- Analytical skills 

12. Management process:
- Leadership skills 
- Strategic planning 
- Project management 
- Process improvement 
- Financial analysis 
- Attention to detail 
- Strong communication skills
